**What happened?**
A clear description of what the skill did wrong.

**What did you expect?**
What should have happened instead.

**Project context**
Stack / framework the skill was running against (e.g. Next.js, Django, static HTML).

**Relevant output**
Paste the cycle report where the issue occurred.
